title: senna pendula var. tenuifolia
intro: Senna pendula var. tenuifolia, also known as the slender senna or narrowleaf cassia, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senna pendula var. tenuifolia include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, often used in combination with other herbs to support digestive health and alleviate various health issues.
